name: AVZ MINERALS LTD.
summary: AVZ Minerals Ltd. is an Australian-based mineral exploration company focused on developing the Manono Lithium and Tin Project in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC). The Manono Project is one of the world’s largest lithium-rich LCT (Lithium, Caesium, Tantalum) pegmatite deposits. AVZ Minerals is headquartered in Perth, Australia.
